top_signals.title: Pakistan Strikes Kill 29 Militants in New Afghan Border Flare-Up
top_signals.summary: Pakistan said it carried out a ground operation and air strikes along its border with Afghanistan on Sunday and Monday, killing 29 militants in response to earlier attacks and marking the biggest flare-up in cross-border violence in weeks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Integra grows reserve by 74% at Florida Canyon gold mine
top_signals.summary: The update raises annual production about 17% to 82,000 oz. gold.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Nigeria identifies major new critical minerals district, large lithium discovery
top_signals.summary: The African country said its Kaduna state represents a "world-class" mineral province and one of the most significant discoveries in recent years.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Op-Ed: DRC is setting the terms of global competition for critical minerals
top_signals.summary: At the centre lies cobalt and the Congolese strategy to move up the value chain.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Ground view Kazakhstan: Brezhnev’s needles
top_signals.summary: Kazakhstan holds a vast geological archive from the Soviet era that could aid in supplying critical minerals to the West.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Site visit: Blue Lagoon leverages cash into Dome’s 1M oz resource bid
top_signals.summary: The operation opened a year ago and now aims to lift Dome to a steady 150 tonnes per day before drill rigs return to the 215-sq.-km property later this year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Fortune Minerals gets $35M for Nico road
top_signals.summary: Natural Resources Canada’s First and Last Mile Fund will reimburse three-quarters of eligible costs.
